themes.themeDescription: Users report issues using fingerprint or face unlock features after the latest app release, requiring repeated PIN inputs or forcing app restarts.
representativeQuotes: Fingerprint lock fails to detect 80% of the time after updating the app. PIN verification is working though.
Face ID scan is sluggish. It gets stuck on the loading page forever. Please resolve biometric lag.
actionIdeas: Review Android BiometricPrompt implementation hooks for timing leaks or UI blocks.
Provide automatic fallback dialog to PIN input when fingerprint hardware times out.

themes.themeDescription: Customers are facing system glitches when setting up Auto-Pay instructions for mutual fund monthly SIPs, particularly with certain public sector banks.
representativeQuotes: SIP mandate approval through net banking keeps failing on the final step.
Auto-debit setup is showing successful, but my SIP was skipped yesterday with no explanation.
actionIdeas: Enhance API payment gateway telemetry for SIP mandate endpoints to identify bank-specific routing errors.
Send proactive in-app notifications if SIP auto-pay configuration encounters a bank clearance warning.
